scripts.dev: npm run build:api && concurrently -n vite,firebase,api-watch,api -c cyan,yellow,green,magenta "vite" "firebase emulators:start --only firestore,auth --import .emulator-data --export-on-exit" "cd api && npm run watch" "cd api && npx nodemon --watch dist --ext js --exec func start"
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:api
scripts.ship: npm run build:all && playwright test && npm run deploy && npm run deploy:api
scripts.ship:beta: npm run build:all && npm run deploy:beta && npm run deploy:api:beta
scripts.deploy:api: cd api && npm run build && func azure functionapp publish editsvgcode-api
scripts.deploy:api:beta: cd api && npm run build && func azure functionapp publish editsvgcode-api-beta
scripts.preview:deploy: npm run build && firebase hosting:channel:deploy preview --expires 7d
